query_title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil

recommendations.title: The City of Violence
recommendations.overview: Tae-su, a detective fighting organized crime, returns to his hometown for his high school friend Wang-jae's funeral. There, he meets his old friends Pil-ho, Dong-hwan and Seok-hwan and they reminisce. Suspecting something fishy about Wang-jae's death

recommendations.title: Burning
recommendations.overview: Deliveryman Jong-su is out on a job when he runs into Hae-mi, a girl who once lived in his neighborhood. She asks if he'd mind looking after her cat while she's away on a trip to Africa. On her return, she introduces to Jong-su an enigmatic young man

recommendations.title: Lady Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Released after being wrongfully convicted and imprisoned for 13 years, a woman begins executing her elaborate plan of retribution.

recommendations.title: Montage
recommendations.overview: A woman's child is kidnapped and killed after paying the ransom. 15 years later, a mysterious figure is seen visiting the site of killing and another kidnapping occurs using the same methods. The woman teams up with a detective to catch the killer on

recommendations.title: Night in Paradise
recommendations.overview: An assassin named Tae-goo is offered a chance to switch sides with his rival Bukseong gang, headed by Chairman Doh. Tae-goo rejects the offer that results in the murder of his sister and niece. In revenge, Tae-goo brutally kills Chairman Doh and his

recommendations.title: The Swindlers
recommendations.overview: A group of swindlers unite to hunt down an infamous con man who was known dead, amid their hidden motives and deception.

recommendations.title: The House That Jack Built
recommendations.overview: Failed architect, engineer and vicious murderer Jack narrates the details of some of his most elaborately orchestrated crimes, each of them a towering piece of art that defines his life's work as a serial killer for twelve years.

recommendations.title: Believer 2
recommendations.overview: A determined detective continues his search for the truth behind Asia's largest drug organization and its elusive boss he has unfinished business with.

recommendations.title: Poetry
recommendations.overview: A South Korean woman in her sixties enrolls in a poetry class as she grapples with her faltering memory and her grandson's appalling wrongdoing.

recommendations.title: The Outlaws
recommendations.overview: In Chinatown, law and order is turned upside down when a trio of feral Chinese gangsters arrive, start terrorizing civilians, and usurping territory. The beleaguered local gangsters team up with the police, lead by the badass loose cannon Ma Seok-do,
